text.title: VUI Accessibility and Inclusivity Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Is per-accent WER ≤15% across the top-5 dialects per target language?

branch.question: Does every voice flow have a text alternate covering all commands?
Are critical actions confirmed with audible AND visible cues?

text.example: Concrete walk: Faion VUI assistant: balanced eval set WER ≤12%; text mode mirrors voice grammar; dual confirmation on every payment action → approve.
